title: Vaccines Save 154 Million Lives, But Face Challenges in Efficacy and Safety
description: Vaccines have prevented 154 million deaths over 50 years, yet issues like waning protection against evolving viruses and rare adverse events like myocarditis persist. This article examines the data behind their triumphs and limitations.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Vaccines Save 154 Million Lives, But Face Challenges in Efficacy and Safety
